message: WMI-2 live resource inconsistency (bookkeeping-field-threshold-gate): the resource's bookkeeping-value field 'socket.state' is consulted inconsistently while the resource stays live (no free) — a candidate live type/extent confusion. [mechanism:bookkeeping-field-threshold-gate;indicates=WMI-2] [mem:struct=socket;field=state;offset=0] [oracle:assert=socket.state is interpreted consistently across all live consumers;assume=resource stays live while read under >= 2 incompatible models]
